title: New elements are not updated when linking boards
excerpt:
I have a board on Monday where I want to manage my budget. I enter all the expenses I have there. This means that I also enter payments there on an ongoing basis. 
On another board there should be a summary, which takes …

posts.author: SoerenWaltrop (Sören Backhove)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have a board on Monday where I want to manage my budget. I enter all the expenses I have there. This means that I also enter payments there on an ongoing basis.

On another board there should be a summary, which takes over all changes to existing elements (works) but also the numbers of new elements (does not work).

Can anyone help?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml: Those new elements are not added automatically in the connected items, that’s why the new items into account in the summary board.

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @SoerenWaltrop

We’ve developed an app called Connected Boards Automations. Which allows to run robust automations on connected boards column, here’s how it can be used in this case →

Automatically connect items based on one or multiple criteria →

Screenshot 2024-08-06 at 16.24.262300×392 27.2 KB

Also worth adding that it also supports -

  1. Automatically removing connecting.

  2. Syncing values between connected items.

  3. Cross-board automations (trigger in the connected board and action in the current board)

You can find it in the monday.com app marketplace in the platform or here - https://monday.com/marketplace/listing/10000321/connected-boards-automations-

Hope that helps!
